description: '''Egg punk''' (originally known as '''Devo-core''') is an [[Internet rock|Internet]] [[microgenre]] of [[punk rock]] that emerged in the 2010s. The genre came to be known as "egg punk" due to a series of [[internet meme]]s. The style is characterized by a [[lo-fi]] recording style and satirical tone, influenced by [[New wave music|new wave]] band [[Devo (band)|Devo]].
